Bash(python3 -c "
from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE_TYPE

prs = Presentation\('outputs/slides/AcceptanceTest_prototype.pptx'\)

print\('📊 Slide Analysis:'\)
print\('=' * 60\)

for idx, slide in enumerate\(prs.slides, 1\):
    has_image = False
    image_count = 0
    text_count = 0
    
    for shape in slide.shapes:
        if shape.shape_type == MSO_SHAPE_TYPE.PICTURE:
            has_image = True
            image_count += 1
        elif hasattr\(shape, 'text_frame'\):
            text_count += 1
    
    if has_image:
        print\(f'Slide {idx:2d}: ✅ Contains {image_count} image\(s\), {text_count} text box\(es\)'\)
    elif idx <= 5 or idx >= 12:  # Show first 5 and last slides
        print\(f'Slide {idx:2d}: Text only \({text_count} text boxes\)'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(python3 -c "
from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches

print\('\\\\n📐 Image Size Verification:'\)
print\('=' * 60\)

prs_prototype = Presentation\('outputs/slides/AcceptanceTest_prototype.pptx'\)

for idx, slide in enumerate\(prs_prototype.slides, 1\):
    for shape in slide.shapes:
        if hasattr\(shape, 'image'\):
            print\(f'Slide {idx}:'\)
            print\(f'  Image size: {shape.width.inches:.2f}\\" x {shape.height.inches:.2f}\\"'\)
            print\(f'  Position: \({shape.left.inches:.2f}\\", {shape.top.inches:.2f}\\"\)'\)
            print\(f'  File size in PPTX: {len\(shape.image.blob\)} bytes'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(python3 -c "
from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE_TYPE

prs = Presentation\('/tmp/test_text_only_output.pptx'\)

print\('\\\\n🔄 Backward Compatibility Test:'\)
print\('=' * 60\)
print\(f'Total slides: {len\(prs.slides\)}'\)

for idx, slide in enumerate\(prs.slides, 1\):
    has_image = False
    text_boxes = 0
    
    for shape in slide.shapes:
        if shape.shape_type == MSO_SHAPE_TYPE.PICTURE:
            has_image = True
        elif hasattr\(shape, 'text_frame'\):
            text_boxes += 1
    
    status = '✅ WITH IMAGE' if has_image else '📄 Text only'
    print\(f'Slide {idx}: {status} \({text_boxes} text boxes\)'\)

print\('\\\\n✅ Backward compatibility: PASSED'\)
print\('Text-only slides render correctly without errors'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib
root = Path\('/Users/taoran.wang/Documents/PaperReader'\)

def sha\(path\):
    h = hashlib.sha256\(\)
    with open\(path, 'rb'\) as f:
        for chunk in iter\(lambda: f.read\(8192\), b''\):
            h.update\(chunk\)
    return h.hexdigest\(\)

pairs = [
    \(root/'output/images/Human-In-the-Loop_figure_1.png', root/'outputs/images/Human-In-the-Loop_figure_1.png'\),
    \(root/'output/images/Human-In-the-Loop_figure_2.png', root/'outputs/images/Human-In-the-Loop_figure_2.png'\),
    \(root/'output/images/Human-In-the-Loop_figure_3.png', root/'outputs/images/Human-In-the-Loop_figure_3.png'\),
    \(root/'prompts/v3_prompt.py', root/'src/prompts/v3_prompt.py'\),
    \(root/'prompts/research_meeting_prompt.py', root/'src/prompts/research_meeting_prompt.py'\),
    \(root/'prompts/phd_meeting_prompt_v2.py', root/'src/prompts/phd_meeting_prompt_v2.py'\),
    \(root/'prompts/slide_planning_prompt.py', root/'src/prompts/slide_planning_prompt.py'\),
    \(root/'prompts/narrative_planning_prompt.py', root/'src/prompts/narrative_planning_prompt.py'\),
]
for a, b in pairs:
    if a.exists\(\) and b.exists\(\):
        print\(f'{a.relative_to\(root\)} == {b.relative_to\(root\)} -> {sha\(a\) == sha\(b\)}'\)
    else:
        print\(f'{a.relative_to\(root\)} or {b.relative_to\(root\)} missing'\)
PY)
